title: Wire the full LiveView sandbox stack for an app
prompt: Write a checklist doc `docs/liveview_sandbox_wiring.md` that enumerates the FIVE files/sections needed to make LiveView tests work with Ecto sandbox: (1) `config/test.exs` — enable `:sql_sandbox`, (2) `endpoint.ex` — plug `Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox` at the top, (3) `endpoint.ex` — add `:user_agent` to socket connect_info, (4) router or LV module — add `{MyAppWeb.UserAuth, :sandbox}` on_mount hook before auth hooks, (5) `UserAuth` — implement `on_mount(:sandbox, ...)` to call allow/2. Must mention all 5 pieces.
tier_rationale: 5-point checklist with named files. Comprehensive overview challenge.
